name: power-platform
description: Power Platform specialist team — 11 agents (incl. power-platform-tester, power-bi-engineer) and 21 skills, with strong ALM/git coverage for solutions, flows, and PBIP. A house-opinions hook flags 8 §3/§4 violations; the knowledge bank carries production decision trees (PA-flow recovery, Dataverse token-acquisition, PCF React surface, PBIR Enhanced debug + build reference, DAX silent-zero scoring, REST-first debugging, PBIR DAX + M Query pitfalls, sempy.fabric, Code Apps gotchas, PBIP deploy vars + #839 gotcha, PBIP fast-triage router — symptom→fix in 1–2 steps with MCP-optional source chain) plus a real-engagement scenarios bank. Bundles the community pbix-mcp server (d0nk3yhm/pbix-mcp, MIT) for Power BI .pbix/.pbit read/write/DAX-eval (requires `pip install pbix-mcp`); documents (does not bundle) the official Microsoft Dataverse MCP (CLAUDE.md §9a). Extends ravenclaude-core.
